tasks.label: Start Starcoder2-3B Ollama GPU (Auto Server & Wait)
args: & { if (-not (Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 11434).TcpTestSucceeded) { Write-Host '🚀 Starting Ollama server...'; Start-Process -NoNewWindow ollama -ArgumentList 'serve' -PassThru | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 }; Write-Host '💾 Preloading Starcoder2-3B model on GPU...'; try { ollama run starcoder-2 'Warmup for GPU caching' | Out-Null } catch { $_ | Out-File "$env:TEMP\starcoder2_task_error.log" -Append; Write-Host "⚠️ Error logged to $env:TEMP\starcoder2_task_error.log" }; Write-Host '✅ Starcoder2-3B ready for Cline or AI Toolkit connection.' }

tasks.label: Run All Startup Tasks
dependsOn: Start Starcoder2-3B Ollama GPU (Auto Server & Wait)
